seoTitle: Wentworth Point vs Werai — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wentworth Point and Werai. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wentworth Point vs Werai: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wentworth Point and Werai.
heading: Wentworth Point vs Werai — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wentworth Point, New South Wales and Werai, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wentworth Point has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Werai (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wentworth Point or Werai safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wentworth Point has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Werai scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wentworth Point scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Werai scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wentworth Point or Werai?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wentworth Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
